mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM places p
INNER JOIN place_tags pt ON p.id = pt.place_id AND pt.rest_type = #{restType}
WHERE p.status = 'approved'
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_reviews (`쉼표번호`, place_id, rating, content, verified, created_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{placeId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{verified}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, `쉼표번호`, place_id, rating, content, verified, created_at FROM place_reviews WHERE place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_bookmarks (`쉼표번호`, place_id, created_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{placeId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM place_bookmarks WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.address, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.operating_hours, p.ai_score, p.status, p.created_at FROM places p INNER JOIN place_bookmarks pb ON p.id = pb.place_id WHERE pb.`쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} ORDER BY pb.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM places WHERE name = #{name} AND address = #{address}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO places (name, address, latitude, longitude, ai_score, status, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{aiScore}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
INSERT INTO place_tags (place_id, tag_name, rest_type) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{tagName}, #{restType})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM places WHERE name LIKE '%화장실%' OR name LIKE '%주차장%' OR name LIKE '%주차%'
DELETE pt FROM place_tags pt INNER JOIN places p ON pt.place_id = p.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%화장실%' OR p.name LIKE '%주차장%' OR p.name LIKE '%주차%'
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, address, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, ai_score, status, created_at, (6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(longitude) - RADIANS(#{lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(latitude)) )) AS distance FROM places WHERE status = 'approved' HAVING distance <= #{radius} ORDER BY distance LIMIT 20
